expectations.evidence: LLM judge: Recommends and shows a while-loop accumulator: "function sum(n){ let acc = 0; while (n !== 0) { acc = acc + n; n = n - 1; } return acc; }" labeled (if -> while) #10 + (variable -> assignment) #13.

expectations.evidence: LLM judge: Tail-recursion is presented only as "the trap to avoid" (V8 has no PTC, still overflows); the final recommendation is the while loop: "Your call on which to apply -- I'd take the while loop."
